2604.27636.title: Generative structure search for efficient and diverse discovery of molecular and crystal structures
2604.27636.paper_summary: Predicting stable and metastable structures is central to molecular and materials discovery, but remains limited by the cost of searching high-dimensional energy landscapes. Deep generative models offer efficient structure sampling, yet their outputs remain shaped by training data and can underexplore minima that are rare but physically relevant. We introduce generative structure search (GSS), a unified framework that formulates diffusion-based generation and random structure search (RSS) as limiting regimes of a common sampling process driven by learned score fields and physical forces. Coupling these drivers lets GSS use data priors to accelerate sampling while retaining energy-guided exploration of local minima. Across molecular and crystalline systems, GSS recovers diverse metastable structures with more than tenfold lower sampling cost than RSS for broad coverage and remains effective for compositions outside the training distribution. The results establish a physically grounded generative search strategy for discovering structures beyond the reach of data-driven sampling alone.
2604.27636.paper_summary_zh: 預測穩定和亞穩定結構對於分子和材料的發現至關重要，但仍然受到搜尋高維能量景觀的成本限制。深度生成模型提供高效的結構取樣，但其輸出仍然受到訓練數據的影響，並且可能未能充分探索那些稀有但在物理上相關的極小值。我們介紹了生成結構搜尋（GSS），這是一個統一的框架，將基於擴散的生成和隨機結構搜尋（RSS）公式化為由學習的分數場和物理力驅動的共同取樣過程的極限範疇。將這些驅動因素結合起來，GSS 可以利用數據先驗來加速取樣，同時保持對局部極小值的能量引導探索。在分子和晶體系統中，GSS 恢復了多樣的亞穩定結構，其取樣成本比 RSS 低十倍以上，並且對於訓練分佈之外的組成仍然有效。這些結果建立了一種基於物理的生成搜尋策略，用於發現超出僅依賴數據驅動取樣的結構。
2604.27636.author: Yifang Qin et.al.
2604.27636.authors: Yifang Qin, Yu Shi, Junfu Tan, Chang Liu, Ming Zhang, Ziheng Lu
